debug_info.goal:
hyp : ∃ x, ∃ (_ : 4 < x), ∃ x_1, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after x x_1)), x_1.length < 2 * x - 4
m : ℕ
m_is_minimal : ∀ n < m, ¬∃ (_ : 4 < n), ∃ x, ∃ (_ : allExpert (after n x)), x.length < 2 * n - 4
le_m : 4 < m
S : List (Call m)
S_allExp : allExpert (after m S)
S_len_lt : S.length ≤ 2 * m - 5
is_minimal_m : is_minimal m
noHo_S : noHo m S
initPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isInitialCall m S c) S
midPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => decide (¬isInitialCall m S c = true ∧ ¬isFinalCall m S c = true)) S
finalPart : List (Call m) := List.filter (fun c => isFinalCall m S c) S
this✝³ : S.length = initPart.length + midPart.length + finalPart.length
this✝² : m / 2 = initPart.length
this✝¹ : m / 2 = finalPart.length
this✝ : m = initPart.length + finalPart.length
len_s_at_least : m ≤ S.length
this : midPart.length ≤ m - 5
c : Fin m → ℕ := sorry
⊢ ∀ (k : Fin m), 2 * m - 2 - v m S k + c k ≤ 2 * m - 5

failed_attempts:
intro k
      have hm : 0 < m := by linarith
      have hc : c k = 0 := by
        cases Nat.eq_zero_or_pos (c k) with
        | inl hz => exact hz
        | inr hp =>
          have : ¬ m ≤ S.length := by
            have : m + c k ≤ S.length := by
              have : m + 1 ≤ m + c k := by linarith
              exact le_trans this (by linarith [len_s_at_least])
            exact (not_lt_of_ge this) (Nat.lt_add_of_pos_right hp)
          exact False.elim (this len_s_at_least)
      subst hc
      have : 2 * m - 2 - v S k ≤ 2 * m - 2 := by
        exact Nat.sub_le _ _
      exact le_trans (by simpa using this) (by linarith)

intro k
      have hk : c k ≤ 0 := by
        simpa using (Nat.zero_le (c k))
      omega

intro k
      have hc : c k = 0 := by
        simp [c]
      simp [hc]
      linarith

intro k
      have hm : 3 ≤ m := by linarith
      have htsub : 2 * m - 2 ≤ 2 * m - 5 := by
        have : 2 * m - 2 = 2 * m - 5 + 3 := by
          omega
        omega
      have hc : c k = 0 := by
        have : c k ≤ 0 := by omega
        exact Nat.eq_zero_of_le_zero this
      simp [hc]
      exact htsub

intro k
      have hc : c k = 0 := by rfl
      simp [hc]

intro k
      have hm : 1 ≤ m := by linarith
      have hle : 2 * m - 2 ≤ 2 * m - 5 := by
        have : (2 : Nat) ≤ 5 := by decide
        exact Nat.sub_le_sub_left this (2 * m)
      exact le_trans (Nat.le_add_right _ _) hle

intro k
      have hc : c k = 0 := by
        simp [c]
      simp [hc]

intro k
      have h : 2 * m - 2 - v m S k + c k ≤ 2 * m - 2 := by
        exact Nat.le_add_left _ _
      exact le_trans h (by omega)

intro k
      have hc : c k = 0 := by rfl
      simp [hc]
      linarith [Nat.zero_le (v S k)]
    sorry
